entries.title: intake_status gate remediation suggests command that does not complete intake on existing Work
entries.note: Verify remediation command (`creator bootstrap --preset creative-brief-intake`) actually achieves the intended action (intake completion) on an existing Work; replace with a semantically valid command if not.
entries.closure_note: Fixed by V1.47 P1 gate-remediation-audit: intake_status gate now honestly cites 'nexus42 creator bootstrap' per creator-run-preset-entry.md §3.2; explicit test intake_status_remediation_cites_executable_bootstrap added; R-V146P1-QC3-S1 explanatory comment in preset_gates.rs:361–372 documents the --preset vs intake-hardcode architecture.

entries.title: Runtime remediation strings cite repo-internal .mstar/... paths (consider user-facing alternative)
entries.note: For product users (not harness maintainers), citing `.mstar/knowledge/specs/...` paths may be opaque. Consider exposing a user-facing equivalent or stripping the .mstar prefix in user-facing messages. Cross-cuts R-V146P1-QC2-S1/S-2 (test snapshots).
entries.closure_note: Fixed by V1.47 P1: 15 user-facing remediation emit sites across 6 files now cite stable spec names (e.g. 'creator-run-preset-entry spec', 'novel-author-experience §3') instead of raw .mstar/knowledge/specs/... paths. Comprehensive guard test no_gate_remediation_embeds_raw_dotmstar_paths added in preset_gates.rs:1161–1265.
